prompt: I have this complex refactoring that touches 15 files. Can you start a team to work on it in parallel?
note: Explicit keywords + scale signal

prompt: I need multiple perspectives on this architecture decision. Can you get some experts to weigh in?
note: Explicit keywords + multi-domain need

prompt: Delegate this implementation task to a subagent while I work on something else
note: Explicit delegation keyword

prompt: I want to divide and conquer this feature - can you scout the codebase first, then plan, then implement?
note: Explicit pattern keywords

prompt: Spawn agents to review this code from security, performance, and DX perspectives
note: Explicit keywords + multi-domain

prompt: This codebase has 200 files and I need to migrate from REST to GraphQL throughout. Where do I even start?
note: IMPLICIT: Scale signal (200 files) + complexity signal (where to start) - no explicit team keywords

prompt: I need to understand this monorepo structure. It's overwhelming - there are packages I don't even know exist.
note: IMPLICIT: Complexity signal (overwhelming) + scale signal (monorepo) - no explicit keywords

prompt: Before I implement this auth feature, I need to understand how the current system handles sessions, cookies, and JWTs. But I don't know where any of that code lives.
note: IMPLICIT: Exploration needed (don't know where code lives) + multi-domain (sessions/cookies/JWTs)

prompt: Is this API design secure, performant, and maintainable? I want to make sure before we commit to it.
note: IMPLICIT: Multi-domain review needed (security, performance, DX) - no explicit 'team' mention

prompt: We need to refactor the database layer, API layer, and frontend state management all at once for this new feature. They're pretty independent.
note: IMPLICIT: Parallelism signal (independent parts) + multi-workstream - no delegation keywords

prompt: Just read this file for me
note: Single file, simple task

prompt: What do you think about this approach?
note: Opinion request, single perspective sufficient

prompt: Can you edit this function to handle null cases?
note: Single function, bounded scope

prompt: I prefer to work solo on this - no subagents needed
note: Explicit anti-trigger

prompt: Help me understand how this code works
note: Explanation request, single-agent sufficient

prompt: Fix the bug in line 42 of src/utils.ts
note: Specific location, bounded scope

prompt: I need to update the README and add a new example file
note: EDGE: Two independent tasks, but trivial scope - prefer sequential over team overhead

prompt: This is a massive refactor but I've already mapped out every change needed in this detailed plan. Just follow the steps.
note: EDGE: Large scope but fully specified - sequential execution sufficient

prompt: Review this PR and keep fixing issues until it's clean. Don't stop at the first round if there are still problems.
note: Till Done pattern (code domain) - iterative refinement with explicit 'keep going'

prompt: I just wrote this 500-line module. Can you make sure it's production-ready? Check everything - bugs, style, tests, security.
note: IMPLICIT Till Done: Production-ready implies multiple refinement passes

prompt: These tests keep failing. Fix them and keep running till they all pass.
note: Till Done pattern (tests domain) - checker is test runner, fixer is test fixer

prompt: The README is incomplete. Keep adding sections until it covers everything a new contributor needs.
note: Till Done pattern (docs domain) - checker validates completeness

prompt: Quick review of this function - just tell me if you see any obvious bugs.
note: Single-pass check, not iterative refinement

prompt: This PR is a mess. Just yolo it and make it production-ready. Keep fixing until it's clean.
note: YOLO + Till Done: autonomous iteration without human between rounds

prompt: Yolo this feature - explore, plan, and build it without asking me between steps.
note: YOLO modifier on Scout→Planner→Worker pattern

prompt: I need to migrate 50 files from REST to GraphQL. Just yolo it and get it done.
note: YOLO modifier on Divide-and-Conquer: spawn all workers, batch process

prompt: This code is rough but I need it perfect. Just do whatever it takes, don't ask me between steps.
note: IMPLICIT YOLO: 'whatever it takes' + 'don't ask between steps'
